response:
The video game that featured the Houston Rockets player named NBA Sixth Man of the Year in 2012 is **NBA Live 18**. 

This game, released in 2017, included James Harden as its cover athlete, and it was the 21st installment in the "NBA Live" series. The game was noted for its improvements over previous entries and was recognized as the highest-rated game of the series since "NBA Live 10."
